top_signals.title: Second Front Achieves NATO UNCLASSIFIED ATO, Deploys DIANA Mission-Critical Platform in 17 Days
top_signals.summary: Deployment with NATO DIANA reinforces Second Front’s role in accelerating secure software delivery for allied nations and regulated defence environments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tony Blair accuses Starmer of damaging economy by clinging to manifesto pledges
top_signals.summary: Sir Tony Blair has taken a swipe at Sir Keir Starmer for sticking to campaign pledges from Labour’s 2024 manifesto, which he says are economically damaging and should have been dropped “right at the outset.” In a 5,000-word essay published by his think tank, Labour’s longest serving PM pointed out that Budgets put forward by [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK household energy bills to rise by 13% from July to two-year high
top_signals.summary: Ofgem’s cap increase means annual energy costs will rise to £1,862

top_signals.title: TfL decommissions Oxford Circus air conditioning despite sweltering heat
top_signals.summary: Temperatures may be hitting record highs in the capital but City commuters are unlikely to find relief from the heat underground, after TfL decided to decommission the air conditioning systems at one of its busiest stations. London’s transport operator unveiled plans in 2012 to install air cooling systems at Oxford Circus and Green Park, two [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
